title: Overnight Bacterial Batch Culture
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bnnem","text":"Purpose of this protocol is to grow up single colonies of bacteria for use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pipette 5 mL of LB Broth into bacterial culture tube.
Add desired antibiotic at appropriate concentration (often 1:1000).
Pick single colony/scrape glycerol stock and inoculate LB Broth.
Incubate batch culture overnight at 37°C, shaking.
creator: Dalhousie Igem
